title: Jamaican Cheesy Wrap
description: A delicious and flavorful wrap filled with spicy Jamaican seasoning, melted cheese, and sautéed mushrooms.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Jamaican seasoning to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until tender.
Place the large flour tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle the shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the cheese is melted and the tortilla is crispy.
Cut in half and serve immediately.
